sentence: O tempo não está nada bom hoje.
ipa: u ˈtẽpu ˈnɐ̃w̃ eˈʃta ˈnadɐ ˈbõ ˈoʒɨ
gloss_en: The weather is not good at all today.
notes: Article 'o' raised to [u] and unstressed reduction per cintra1971; nasal [õ] in 'bom' per cruzferreira1995.

sentence: Estes sapatos custam quarenta euros.
ipa: ˈeʃtɨʃ sɐˈpatuʃ ˈkuʃtɐ̃w̃ kwɐˈɾẽtɐ ˈewɾuʃ
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: Coda [ʃ] in 'estes'/'sapatos' and reduced pretonics per cruzferreira1995; Lisbon standard per segura2013.

sentence: A reunião é amanhã às três da tarde.
ipa: ɐ ʁewniˈɐ̃w̃ ˈɛ ɐmɐˈɲã aʃ ˈtɾeʒ dɐ ˈtaɾdɨ
gloss_en: The meeting is tomorrow at three in the afternoon.
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'reunião' and coda [ʃ] in 'três'/'às' per cruzferreira1995; Lisbon norm per segura2013.

sentence: O meu irmão vive perto do rio.
ipa: u ˈmew iˈɾmɐ̃w̃ ˈvivɨ ˈpɛɾtu du ˈʁiu
gloss_en: My brother lives near the river.
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'irmão' and 'meu irmão' liaison per cintra1971; article 'o'→[u] per segura2013.

sentence: Segue em frente e vira na segunda rua.
ipa: ˈsɨɡɨ ɐ̃j̃ ˈfɾẽt i ˈviɾɐ nɐ sɨˈɡũdɐ ˈʁuɐ
gloss_en: Keep straight ahead and turn on the second street.
notes: Nasal [ẽ] in 'em frente' and 'segue em' liaison per cintra1971; imperative register per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: A sopa de peixe estava deliciosa.
ipa: ɐ ˈsopɐ dɨ ˈpɐjʃ eˈʃtavɐ dɨlisiˈozɐ
gloss_en: The fish soup was delicious.
notes: 'ei' diphthong in 'peixe' and coda [ʃ] per cruzferreira1995; open-mid vowels per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Onde é que apanho o autocarro?
ipa: ˈõdɨ ˈɛ kɨ ɐˈpaɲu u awtuˈkaʁu
gloss_en: Where do I catch the bus?
notes: Palatal [ɲ] in 'apanho' and strong [ʁ] in 'autocarro' per cruzferreira1995; 'que apanho o' liaisons per cintra1971.

sentence: Quantas pessoas vêm ao jantar?
ipa: kwɐ̃ˈtɐʃ pɨˈs̺oɐʒ ˈvɐ̃j̃ ɐu ʒɐ̃ˈtaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Nasal [ɐ̃]/[ẽ] and coda [ʃ] in 'quantas'/'pessoas' per cruzferreira1995; interrogative per segura2013.

sentence: Se pudesse, comprava aquela casa.
ipa: sɨ puˈdɛs̺ɨ kõˈpɾavɐ ɐˈkɛlɐ ˈkazɐ
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Reduced pretonics and [ʃ] in 'pudesse' per cruzferreira1995; conditional-imperfect frame per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: Comprámos fruta e legumes na feira.
ipa: kõˈpɾamuʃ ˈfɾutɐ i lɨˈɡumɨʒ nɐ ˈfɐjɾɐ
gloss_en: We bought fruit and vegetables at the market.
notes: 'fruta e' liaison and coda [ʃ] in 'legumes' per cintra1971; 'ei' diphthong in 'feira' per cruzferreira1995.

sentence: Amanhã vamos de barco até à ilha.
ipa: ɐmɐˈɲã ˈvamuʒ dɨ ˈbaɾku ɐˈtɛ a ˈiʎɐ
gloss_en: Tomorrow we go by boat to the island.
notes: Palatal [ɲ] in 'amanhã', [ʎ] in 'ilha' and 'até à' liaison per cruzferreira1995; nasal [ã] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Telefona-me quando chegares a casa.
ipa: tɨlɨˈfonɐ mɨ ˈkwɐ̃du ʃɨˈɡaɾɨz ɐ ˈkazɐ
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: Nasal [ɐ̃] in 'quando' and [ʃ] in 'chegares' per cruzferreira1995; clitic imperative per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: Boa tarde, então como tem passado?
ipa: ˈboɐ ˈtaɾd ẽˈtɐ̃w̃ ˈkomu ˈtɐ̃j̃ pɐˈs̺adu
gloss_en: Good afternoon, so how have you been?
notes: Nasal [ɐ̃w̃]/[ẽ] in 'então'/'tem' and coda [ʃ] per cruzferreira1995; greeting register per segura2013.

sentence: Mais vale um pássaro na mão que dois a voar.
ipa: ˈmajʒ ˈvalɨ ˈũ ˈpas̺ɐɾu nɐ ˈmɐ̃w̃ kɨ ˈdojz ɐ vuˈaɾ
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: Coda [ʃ] in 'mais', nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'mão' per cruzferreira1995; proverb attested in cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: O gato preto dorme no sofá.
ipa: u ˈɡatu ˈpɾɛtu ˈdoɾmɨ nu suˈfa
gloss_en: The black cat sleeps on the sofa.
notes: Attested 'gato' [ˈɡatu] per cruzferreira1995; article 'o'→[u] and reduced final [u] per cintra1971.

sentence: Aquele rato fugiu para o buraco.
ipa: ɐˈkɛlɨ ˈʁatu fuˈʒiw ˈpaɾɐ u buˈɾaku
gloss_en: That mouse ran into the hole.
notes: Attested 'rato' [ˈʁatu] with strong initial [ʁ] per cruzferreira1995; reduced pretonics per segura2013.

sentence: O mundo inteiro fala deste assunto.
ipa: u ˈmũdu ĩˈtɐjɾu ˈfalɐ ˈdɛʃtɨ ɐˈs̺ũtu
gloss_en: The whole world talks about this subject.
notes: Attested nasal 'mundo' [ˈmũdu] per cruzferreira1995; coda [ʃ] in 'deste' and 'mundo inteiro' liaison per cintra1971.

sentence: Ele é muito chato quando bebe.
ipa: ˈelɨ ˈɛ ˈmujtu ˈʃatu ˈkwɐ̃du ˈbɛbɨ
gloss_en: He is very annoying when he drinks.
notes: Attested 'chato' [ˈʃatu] per cruzferreira1995; nasal [ɐ̃] in 'quando' and 'ele é' liaison per cintra1971.

sentence: A pilha do relógio está gasta.
ipa: ɐ ˈpiʎɐ du ˈʁɨlɔʒiu eˈʃta ˈɡaʃtɐ
gloss_en: The watch battery is dead.
notes: Attested palatal 'pilha' [ˈpiʎɐ] per cruzferreira1995; coda [ʃ] in 'está'/'gasta' per segura2013.

sentence: O sol brilha por cima das colinas.
ipa: u ˈsɔɫ ˈbɾiʎɐ puɾ ˈsimɐ dɐʃ kuˈlinɐʃ
gloss_en: The sun shines over the hills.
notes: Velarised coda [ɫ] in 'sol', palatal [ʎ] in 'brilha' and coda [ʃ] in 'das' per cruzferreira1995.
